name: Floor Stocks Refunds for Tires and Fuel

eligibility.description: Available to manufacturers, producers, or importers of tires or taxable fuel held by a dealer for sale as of October 1, 2028.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a credit or refund for the difference in tax paid on inventory (tires and taxable fuel) held by a dealer when tax rates are scheduled to decrease on October 1, 2028.
